title: We Smile Dental Clinic - Oasis Ara Damansara
address: R-11-1, Oasis Piazza, Oasis Square, 2, Jalan PJU 1A/7, Oasis Ara Damansara, 47301 Petaling Jaya, Selangor, Malaysia

reviews.name: Ain Aqilah
reviews.text:
Best & gentlest scaling session I’ve ever had in my life. Dr. Ameerah is nice, professional, and has a very soft voice. I’m very pleased and happy with the service. I would definitely recommend this clinic to those who are typically scared of dental treatments or have sensitive teeth.

Throughout the session, I only felt a little pressure and some tickling sensation, and the rest of it was great. 😊 The receptionist was also very kind and welcoming. And it was fast too ya!

reviews.name: Esther Foo
reviews.text: Just did my scaling with Dr Ameerah and she was really friendly and gentle during the whole process. Will definitely come back again!

reviews.name: Raziqin Hazeq
reviews.text: Dr Ameerah was the creme de la creme. Thanks alot for the heads up and services. Handled everything smoothly

reviews.name: Badawi Badurddin
reviews.text: Had a very good experience at We Smile Dental Care with Dr. Ameerah. I came together with my child for scaling treatment and we were both very satisfied with the service. Dr. Ameerah was gentle, professional, and explained everything clearly. The staff were also friendly and welcoming, making us feel comfortable throughout the visit. Highly recommended for anyone looking for a good dental clinic for both adults and kids!

reviews.name: Ashley Ang
reviews.text: Dr Ameerah was so gentle and explains every steps she's about to do so you'll feel more at ease. She always makes sure you're comfortable before moving on

street: R-11-1, Oasis Piazza, Oasis Square, 2, Jalan PJU 1A/7
description:
We Smile Dental Clinic, situated in the vibrant Oasis Square of Selangor, stands out as a premier destination for comprehensive dental care. The clinic is dedicated to providing a positive patient experience with a focus on preventive and restorative dentistry, fostering a community environment that prioritizes oral health and overall well-being.

Upon arrival, patients are greeted by a warm atmosphere and a friendly team committed to personalized care. The seamless journey through consultations and treatments, including gentle scaling sessions performed by Dr. Ameerah, ensures that even the most anxious patients feel at ease. Recent feedback highlights her professionalism and gentle approach, enhancing the overall patient experience.

Conveniently located within Oasis Piazza, We Smile Dental Clinic is easily accessible for residents in the surrounding neighborhoods. With operating hours that accommodate busy schedules, it serves as an essential healthcare partner in Selangor, reinforcing its commitment to cultivating lasting relationships and promoting community health.

title: Klinik Pergigian Goodcare
address: 1B, 1, Jalan SS 26/9, Taman Mayang Jaya, 47301 Petaling Jaya, Selangor, Malaysia

reviews.name: Uthra Morgan
reviews.text:
Had my routine dental check up and I’m honestly so happy with the experience.

Dr Lean did an amazing job on my teeth. The scaling and polishing process was so satisfying and comfortable from start to finish. Every step was done with so much care and attention, and I really appreciated how gentle and detailed the treatment was. After the treatment, my teeth felt so clean, fresh, smooth, and looked brighter too.

What I appreciated most was how comfortable and reassuring the whole session felt. It didn’t feel rushed at all, and I felt well taken care of throughout the appointment.

Thank you, Dr Lean, for making the visit such a pleasant one. Definitely left the clinic feeling more confident with my smile.  Highly recommend to anyone looking for a good dental experience!

reviews.name: YY Lee
reviews.text:
This was my second visit to Goodcare Dental, and I specifically chose to wait for Dr. Chin (Dr. Lean Wai Chin), even though it meant rescheduling my dental appointment.
Dr. Chin is a young, warm, and professional dentist who provides detailed consultations, even for simple procedures such as scaling. He patiently explained my current tooth condition and reassured me not to worry excessively.
Thank you, Dr. Chin, for your professionalism, patience, and genuine care. I highly recommend his services, especially to those who are anxious or fearful about visiting the dentist.

reviews.name: Yap Ai kee
reviews.text: Dr is super patient and he offered the best treatment with good price. The scaling and whitening treatment is comfortable.

reviews.name: dennis woo
reviews.text:
Dr Lim V Ren is one of the most gentle dentist around. He also helped fixed my mom's botched denture work by another dentist. So glad we switched to this dentist.

Also the service by the staff of this dental clinic is superb. They send reminders to you nearing your appointment date and also follow up on you after.

reviews.name: Revina BA
reviews.text:
I went for a deep cavity, scared the cost would exceed my budget, but came home not feeling pain and not broke either 😂

Dr. Chin was very informative about the treatment options and plans, and during treatment, I was constantly checked on to see if I was feeling okay.

I felt very thoroughly cared for and have no more toothache! Goodcare will totally be my go-to dental clinic as an expat here in PJ.

reviews.name: efghijklmin
reviews.text: Having good experience with the Dr and her assistant.

description:

reviews.name: Bik Tan
reviews.text: Last minute made an appointment. Very friendly and waited for me till 730pm. Did a patch and scaling. Good ambience and clean office. Thank you for the service

reviews.name: Rhy Park
reviews.text:
If you are looking for a great dental clinic, I highly recommend Dr. Nicholas Fung. He is incredibly professional and doesn't just do the work, he actually educates and advises you on your overall tooth health. No dentist before had ever mentioned to me that I have mild periodontitis, and I really appreciate him catching it and explaining it so clearly.

His assistant, Miss Goh, was also so helpful and welcoming, which made the whole appointment comfortable and stress-free.

reviews.name: Kapila Wellalage
reviews.text:
Friendly service,
Consult with in few minutes without appointment or reservation

title: Circle Dental Clinic
address: 108-A (First Floor, Jalan SS 24/2, 47301 Petaling Jaya, Selangor, Malaysia

reviews.name: Wooi Chun Loo
reviews.text: I had my visit last Sunday. This was my first visit to a dentist since primary school, and overall, it was a very good experience. I had scaling and polishing done, along with a wisdom tooth extraction. They explained every step of the process clearly and gently, making sure I was well informed and comfortable throughout the treatment. Highly recommended.

reviews.name: WY
reviews.text: very attentive doctor, went there for wisdom teeth removal and scaling. overall had a good experience there for treatments and consultation

reviews.name: shabitha naga
reviews.text: Called in to see if i could walk in for a review as i was a having toothache, Mr Alex had attended the call and he was very attentive throughout the conversation . During my visit to the clinic , i was attended by Dr.Cinder . She was very polite and very detailed in explaining to me about my impacted tooth and how surgery would help . She also took the time to decribe how the procedure will be done , the cost and the recovery . Definitely recommend a visit here for your dental fix . Thank you Dr.Cinder and Mr.Alex .

reviews.name: Vai Yee Chan
reviews.text: Had the best dental experience with Dr Cinder and Alex. They both are really awesome in giving me the confidence for the dental implant. This journey was really and they are doing with care and passion with me. Whenever you are having problem, she and Alex is always very responsive towards whatever experiences you had during this implant journey. Circle dentist will always be my first choice.

reviews.name: Ramesh Chandran
reviews.text: Great service. Patient for doctor Renga since  2008. Reasonable price.

reviews.name: Crystal Wong
reviews.text: Did scaling + polishing and upper wisdom tooth removal with Dr Charlotte, she’s very gentle and attentive. She did the scaling and polishing very thoroughly and the tooth removal is so quick without much pain, and the recovery is fast. Highly recommended this clinic for its professional dentists and modern clean environment !

reviews.name: April Ong
reviews.text: Dr Charlotte is a gentle yet capable dentist. I had fear on the dentist chair, but her calmness puts me at ease. The whole procedure took a fair bit of time, yet the fees are very reasonable. Thank you for a job well done. I will definitely consult her for all future treatments for my whole family and friends.Good luck.

reviews.text: Dr Charlotte and Dr Brian are great, they’re very detailed in their assessment and recommendation on what to do next. Definitely recommended to do your dental services here.

reviews.text: The dentist was nice and attentive, he gave me lots of advice. I was there for teeth scaling and everything went well. Appreciate the staff and dentist for their work and time.

reviews.name: Helwa Aziz
reviews.text: First time @ Klinik Pergigian Kelana Jaya friendly staff, and gentle dentist. The treatment was explained clearly and the process was smooth. Overall, i hd good experience with Dr Chang & assistant. Good Luck in t future .

reviews.name: Kayzo chiang
reviews.text:
第一次来这间牙科，里面的工作人员都非常友好、有效率，也很有活力，整体看诊体验不错

不过楼下的销售摊位让我感到不舒服
对方在我尚未决定购买前，就直接开单并把商品递给我要求付款，推销方式相当有压力
后来我查询一样的产品，价格也明显更低

此外，我也看到销售人员持续向一位老妇人推销，即使对方表示没有预算，仍不断劝购，让人观感不佳

希望院方能留意楼下销售活动的管理，以免影响整体良好的医疗体验。

reviews.name: Norhilwani Che Awang
reviews.text: last year the system was okay, but now, there's always no slot for appointment.

reviews.name: Sh Wong
reviews.text: My friend told me to register via MySejahtera and manage to book the appointment within 1 week I think due to someone cancelled the appointment. Else, the appointment will take another 1 month more. Fees is only RM1 and I get all the things done including the X-ray within 1 and half hours. All staff and doctors are very polite. Good!

the dentist and staff are friendly
recommend coming here have can here many times

reviews.name: Annabelle Teo
reviews.text:
Highly recommended! The dentist was very patient and caring with my child. My kid is usually very difficult and anxious when it comes to dental visits, but surprisingly was very cooperative here.

The clinic environment is clean, welcoming, and filled with toys, which helped my child feel relaxed and comfortable throughout the visit. It made the whole dental experience much more enjoyable.

Special thanks to Dr. Tham for being so gentle, professional, and thorough in explaining every step of the treatment. It’s not easy to find a dentist who is both skilled and great with children. We truly appreciate the excellent care and highly recommend Dr. Tham! 👍👍😊

reviews.name: Yoong Chin Phuan
reviews.text: 1st visit to the dentist, good experience..the dentist Dr. Lee is so patient and gentle. My kid is very anxiety and scared but the dentist was being very patient and tried to calm her down. Can bring your child and give it a try if they are having teeth issue

reviews.text: Dr Chan us an amazing dentist.

reviews.name: E W
reviews.text: Special needs friendly dentist clinic with amazing dentists. Dr Elaine even gets on the floor and is super patient to get the child familiar with her. I’m so glad this service and clinic exists. The waiting space is so kids friendly. They even have a sensory room with darkened walls.

reviews.name: Boon Hui Tiong
reviews.text: Professional dental scaling done here. Dr. Elaine is very professional, gentle and skillful while handling my 5 years old daughter's scaling procedure. Very satisfied with the service here.

reviews.name: bro bentong
reviews.text: Doktor terbaik puas hati dan harga berpatutan👍

reviews.name: Juliana Hanim Kamarulzaman
reviews.text:
I cannot recommend Dr. Mira enough! I have been on my journey with Self-Ligating Braces with her since 2024. After a 7-month hiatus in 2025, I am so relieved to be restarting my treatment in 2026 at Dr. Mira’s brand-new clinic.

She is truly one of the softest, kindest and most talented professionals I’ve ever met. Her workmanship is absolutely meticulous and she takes the time to address every single concern with patience and expertise.

Congratulations on the opening of your new clinic, Dr. Mira!

People are going to love the care here. If you have any issues with your teeth, do not hesitate to come here you are in the best hands and there is truly nothing to worry about :)

reviews.name: Dharma Dev Rajh
reviews.text:
I had a really great experience with this dental clinic. The dentist was very professional, gentle, and took the time to explain the entire scaling and polishing process, which made me feel comfortable and at ease.

The procedure itself was smooth and not painful at all. I could really feel the difference afterward—my teeth felt much cleaner, fresher, and looked noticeably brighter.

The clinic environment was clean and well-maintained, and the staff were friendly and welcoming. Overall, I’m very satisfied with the service and would definitely recommend this dentist to anyone looking for quality dental care.

My 2nd time.
The doctor is very careful, patient, and professional. She explains in detail the treatment plan and price. I am very satisfy with the service provide.
Highly recommended!
Thank you Dr. & staff👏🏻

reviews.name: Amierah
reviews.text: Never in my life I’ve encountered such a nice and warm dentist. Even though I’ve never stepped a foot in the clinic before but I was immediately greeted with such warm smiles. Literally the clinic is radiating of good energy. Not to mention the whale theme was so eye catching. Price was surprisingly very affordable. Love love loveeee the service. 10/10 recommended. Wish nothing but much much success!

reviews.name: Aira Idzaira
reviews.text:
Super recommend this clinic! The doctor and staff are so kind, gentle, and caring. One night, when my husband’s tooth pain was really bad, I messaged them even though the clinic was closed. I know I shouldn’t kacau, but it was an emergency, and I was so worried. Thank God they replied and guided us patiently. 🙏

First consultation for gusi bengkak was only RM50, and tooth extraction RM150. The price is reasonable, but what I appreciate most is their genuine care and excellent service.✨They even checked in after treatment to see how my husband was doing.

If you’ve been putting off a dental visit, give Whale Smile a try. You’ll feel at ease from the moment you walk in, and your dental care will be in good hands. 🌊🦷🐳🐋✨

reviews.name: Ya Ya
reviews.text: The worst dental clinic ever! The scaling was not done thoroughly. There are still plaques here & there. And they charge so expensive of RM150 for a shoddy job! The dentist was hasten in his work. The nurse was inexperienced. The only thing fancy is the tv at the ceiling. That is all. You are paying just for the place, ie rent & not for the work. Wasted money & energy going there!

reviews.text: 我听朋友讲甲洞aeon mall内有位靓仔牙科很好，巧合儿子要去洗牙和check牙齿，就去了这间，回来告诉我这位牙医很好，洗牙不痛，又好解释，所以下次我check牙会去找他了。谢谢可以遇到好牙科

reviews.name: Nick Leong
reviews.text: The pretty dentist is really kind and very attentive. Every time I go for a follow-up, she takes great care of my teeth and makes everything perfect. This time, I even brought my two Zimomo along to visit the pretty dentist too~ 😄

reviews.name: Raz Nur Izzaty
reviews.text: Such a wonderful experience receiving dental treatment here. I’ve previously done scaling and filling treatments before deciding to proceed with my braces treatment, and every visit has been pleasant and reassuring. The entire team is incredibly warm, patient, and gentle, always making me feel comfortable throughout every step of the process. Their professionalism and caring attitude truly made the whole experience smooth and stress-free. Highly recommended!

reviews.name: Zaty Amirah Ahmad Rashidi
reviews.text:
Dr Eunice is very good . Before start treatment she explains the situation and risks. makes my nervousness calm and when she extract my wisdom tooth, no pain at all . She is very good .

Same goes to Ms Sha who handles my booking . Very professional and polite too ! Let me know an hour early that my appointment will be delayed a bit that is sooooo good !

Thank you Dr Eunice !

Thank you Ma Sha & the nurse inside the room who helped do my xray and assist Dr Eunice throughout my time there !

Affordable price !
Good servise and consultation 💕
Best dental clinic ever !

reviews.name: JJ
reviews.text:
I first walked in for consultation. Although it was close to the closing time, Dr. Lim was kind to spare some time for the consultation.

Following the consultation, I went for my dental care and treatment. Dr. Chloe was meticulous and she explained things in great details.

Both Dr. Lim and Dr. Chloe provided excellent service. I am particularly impressed that they were able to communicate and explain things in a language that is easily understood by the patient.

Their staffs, Ena and Wan were also great with their customer service. They indirectly make my visit to Millennium Dental clinic a great one too!

Kudos to the all of the team!

If you're looking for a dental in Damansara Perdana, Millennium Dental Clinic is one you should go to!

reviews.text: 解釋的很清楚很耐心，技術非常好，整個過程都很照顧情緒很放心。

description:

Within its modern interior, the clinic not only offers essential services but also emphasizes comfort and transparency throughout every appointment—traits that resonate strongly with its diverse patient base.

Visitors frequently commend the thoroughness of Dr. Eunice, who takes time to explain treatment options and proactively addresses patient concerns, making even the most anxious feel at ease. Feedback highlights experiences ranging from scaling to fillings, all delivered with warmth and professional expertise—qualities that build lasting relationships.

The clinic operates convenient hours throughout the week, making it accessible for both working professionals and families. Situated in a vibrant neighborhood, it serves as a vital resource for residents looking to maintain their dental health while enjoying a welcoming atmosphere.

title: Tan Dental Surgery
address: F26, Centre point, Lebuh Bandar Utama, Bandar Utama, 47800 Petaling Jaya, Selangor, Malaysia

reviews.name: Sher Lin Yeap
reviews.text: Arrive there at 10am, to fix my brace matter but no professional dentist standby. Not really recommended.

reviews.name: Laura Kang
reviews.text:
Went at 4pm, receptionist said dentist went home (even though they close at 6pm) because no appointments made.

Next day, I tried calling at 1pm many times, but no answer. I work just upstairs, so I walked over to see the dentist/make an appointment but they apparently close until 2pm for lunch.

Receptionist was there eating her lunch nicely at her desk, but refused to open the door for me to even make an appointment for later. I had to speak to her through the locked glass door. ?????

Then I said I want to make an appointment for 4pm later the same day. She said cannot cause dentist will go home by that time. But their operating hours are until 6pm. ?????

So even if I tried to make an appointment prior to my visit, it wouldn’t matter because they go home early before 4pm even though their hours state until 6pm???????

reviews.name: Xin Yi Tan
reviews.text:
Very professional and patience, done my braces with them!!
Dr. Tan personally planned for my braces plan because i can only stay in malaysia for 6 months before my study at overseas, Dr. Tan’s professionalism allows me to have my braces off before going for my overseas study!
Love the service here! 😍😍😍

reviews.name: Matt Le Mack
reviews.text: Highly recommended. Very professional dentist.  In safe hands here.

street: F26, Centre point, Lebuh Bandar Utama
description:
At Tan Dental Surgery, located within the vibrant Centre Point area of Bandar Utama, patients find a focus on orthodontic excellence amidst a primarily general dental practice. With a specialized interest in braces and cosmetic dentistry, the facility combines advanced techniques with personalized patient care, underpinning their commitment to quality oral health.

The journey begins upon entering the welcoming reception area, where patients are greeted by a dedicated team ready to assist. While some feedback indicates challenges with appointment management and availability, many have praised Dr. Tan's expertise, highlighting that treatment plans are tailored with patience and care that resonates well with the community.

Conveniently situated for those in Selangor, the clinic caters to a diverse clientele. Despite mixed experiences related to wait times, the emphasis on professional orthodontic care makes it a relevant choice for residents seeking comprehensive dental solutions. By continually striving for improvement, Tan Dental Surgery aims to enhance their role as a trusted community healthcare provider.

reviews.name: Saiful Nizam Abdul Rashid
reviews.text: Professional doctors, welcoming staff with great service and value for money....keep it up😁😁😁💪💪💪

reviews.name: Kianhoe Tung
reviews.text: good service !

reviews.name: Awesome Max
reviews.text: The Dentist and the Nurses were really helpful, Kind, caring and Attentive to my mum's needs. they also know how to persuade and comfort my mum when she was scared of the Tooth scaling. They have such friendly and positive vibe there eversince I was 14 until now. Oh, how I just Love that place. I highly recommend this for other people to go in the future.

reviews.name: Alissa Jasni
reviews.text: Affordable dental clinic with a very good service! Glad that the doctor here managed to salvage my tooth that was supposed to be extracted according to the other dentist that I visited last month. The staffs there were very friendly ❤️❤️❤️

reviews.name: syahida Shahrul
reviews.text:
Klinik selesa... doctor jelaskan dengan detail semasa cuci gigi macam² tips doctor bagi.
Dalam klinik ada alunan ayat suci Al Quran ♥️
Untuk ibu mengandung yang nak check gigi saya cadangkan klinik ni...staff semua perempuan..peramah lagi.
insyaAllah lepas bersalin nak tampal gigi pulak.

reviews.name: sharifahniah Kamsuri
reviews.text: A good dental clinic, recommended, with reasonable prices and good service.

title: Klinik Pergigian aiDentist Damansara
address: 2-12 , Dataran Pelangi Utama Jalan Masjid , PJU6A, Kampung Sungai Kayu Ara, 47400 Petaling Jaya, Selangor, Malaysia

reviews.name: ziela ismail
reviews.text:
scalling n cabut gigi geraham..
doc ashvin sgt nice n xsakit pun mse cabut.
thanks doc.

reviews.name: Syuhada Zulkifli
reviews.text: Excellent service! I came for scaling and filling, and the dentist (Dr Ash) was very friendly, patient, and professional. The staff were also kind and welcoming. The treatment was smooth and comfortable. Highly recommend this clinic! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

reviews.name: Ethan Chang
reviews.text: Amazing service, helped me fixed my broken front tooth, will come back again

reviews.name: dontask who
reviews.text: It was very pleasant experience. Thank you so much doctor and nurse! :)

reviews.name: Mark Johnson
reviews.text:
Came here randomly for scaling after seeing it online and had a fantastic experience with Dr. Ashvin.

The dentist was extremely thorough during consultation, and was patient in answering my questions.

During the scaling process, his assistant and him were gentle in their approach and often checked in to see if I was uncomfortable, really appreciated that.

Surprisingly, the scaling package here comes with polishing as well, which was something I'd never gotten in my other private dental clinics, so was quite surprised.

Charged RM150 for scaling and RM30 for consultation; would definitely recommend this place if you're looking for a dental clinic that's extremely comfortable and with pleasant staff.

street: 2-12 , Dataran Pelangi Utama Jalan Masjid , PJU6A
description:
